title: Driver — My Jobs Date View
description: Replace or extend the driver My Jobs page with a date-filtered view. Driver selects a date and sees their jobs for that day, sorted by scheduledStart time.
acceptanceCriteria: Page shows a date picker defaulting to today
Jobs shown are only those assigned to the logged-in driver matching the selected date
Jobs sorted by scheduledStart ascending, jobs without scheduledStart shown at the bottom
Each job card shows: title, scheduledStart–scheduledEnd in Finnish format, status badge, schedulingNote
Changing the date picker immediately refetches and updates the list
Empty state shown when no jobs exist for the selected date
implementationNotes: Fetch: GET /api/jobs?scheduledFrom=<start of day ISO>&scheduledTo=<end of day ISO> — backend must support this filter
Driver filtering is enforced server-side via JWT — frontend does not need to pass driverId
Finnish datetime formatting already exists in the codebase — reuse the same pattern
Date picker uses native <input type='date'> — no external library needed
Do not modify the dispatcher board in this task
